name: @simulator/module-daemon
description: Host-neutral supervisor for optional Simulator module daemons

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/testing/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --splitting --external @simulator/module-contract --external koffi
scripts.build:windows-native-integration: bun build src/testing/windows-native-integration.ts --outfile dist/windows-native-integration.mjs --target node --external koffi
